TextView.android:text:
Nutrition Tips
1. Eat Fruits and Vegetables Include a variety of fruits and vegetables in your meals daily.
2. Stay Hydrated Drink plenty of water throughout the day.
3. Balanced Diet Ensure your meals contain proteins, carbohydrates, and healthy fats.
4. Reduce Sugar Intake Limit sugary foods and drinks.
5. Eat Whole Grains Choose whole grain foods like brown rice and whole wheat bread.
6. Include Protein Eat foods like eggs, beans, fish, and chicken.
7. Healthy Snacking Snack on nuts, fruits, or yogurt instead of junk food.
8. Limit Processed Foods Avoid highly processed and fast foods.
9. Portion Control Avoid overeating by controlling portion sizes.
10. Regular Meals Eat meals at consistent times each day.
